title: NeroFlix v1.3.9 Released 🎉
message:
What's New?

✅ Added more Studio category rows
✅ Added more channels for everyone to enjoy
✅ Added more servers — now up to 4 servers available

Known Issues

⚠️ D-Pad remote mapping is not yet fully implemented. For now, using an air mouse provides the best navigation experience.

Coming in v1.4.0

🔧 Premium server activation
🔧 Full D-Pad remote support improvements and fixes

The next update is planned before the end of the month, or possibly sooner.

For now, this update gives everyone more content and server options while we continue working on the remaining features.

❤️ Thank you for supporting NeroFlix! Stay tuned for more updates.
